name: Marketing Sites
description: Fast, conversion-focused websites built with modern tools like React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Every site is optimized for performance, SEO, and accessibility — with Lighthouse scores consistently in the 90s. From landing pages to full business sites, I build experiences that look sharp and turn visitors into leads.
projects: aa-finish-concrete; endohack; solar-initiative; three-sister-boutique; true-nature; trumotion-martial-arts; dr-brett-chiropractor; prime-title-utah; digital-leather-templates

name: Product UI & Web Apps
description: Frontend development for web applications, dashboards, and customer-facing products. I design and build responsive interfaces with clean architecture, reusable components, and attention to usability. Whether you need a new product built from scratch or an existing app redesigned, I deliver polished, scalable frontend experiences.

name: UI/UX Design & Redesigns
description: End-to-end UI/UX design — from wireframes and prototypes in Figma to fully implemented interfaces. I've led complete redesigns of customer-facing apps and internal admin portals, working directly with stakeholders to define features, user flows, and visual direction that drives results.

name: Funnels & Integrations
description: Conversion-optimized funnels and landing pages wired up with the tools your business runs on — Stripe payments, custom authentication, analytics tracking, and CRM connections. I build user flows designed to capture leads and close sales, not just pages that look good.

name: Webflow
description: Custom Webflow sites for clients who want a visually polished, CMS-powered website they can manage themselves. I design and build responsive Webflow sites that match your brand and give you full control over content updates without touching code.

name: GoHighLevel
description: Custom websites and funnels built inside GoHighLevel — ideal for agencies and businesses already on the platform. I design clean, professional GHL sites and landing pages optimized for lead capture, with layouts and flows tested to convert.
